allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(fStars: {d.get\(''''stargazers_count''''\)}\\nForks: {d.get\(''''forks_count''''\)}\\nUpdated: {d.get\(''''updated_at''''\)}\\nPushed: {d.get\(''''pushed_at''''\)}\\nDescription: {d.get\(''''description''''\)}\\nSize: {d.get\(''''size''''\)}KB\\nLanguage: {d.get\(''''language''''\)}\\nOpen Issues: {d.get\(''''open_issues_count''''\)}\\nLicense: {d.get\(''''license'''',{}\).get\(''''name''''\) if d.get\(''''license''''\) else ''''None''''}\)")
